Class Bus

java.lang.Object
Bus
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<Bus>
Direct Known Subclasses:
SportsBus, TrainingBus
public class Bus extends Object implements Comparable<Bus>
Represents a Bus in the transporation system. Each bus has a name,size,price,comfort level,and a list of approved trips. It is associated with a Ministry and can be reserved for trips if suitable. Implements Comparable to allow sorting by bus ID

    • Bus

      public Bus()
      Default constructor.Inializes an empty list of approved trips.

    • Bus

      public Bus(String name, int size, int price, int lev, Ministry mny)
      Constructor to inialize a bus with details
      Parameters:
      name - the name of te bus
      size - the seating capacit of he bus
      price - the price of reserving the bus
      lev - the comfort level(1 = low, 2 = medium, 3 = high)
      mny - the Ministry responsible for the

  • Method Details

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(Bus other)
      Compares two buses by their ID.
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<Bus>
      Parameters:
      other - another bus object
      Returns:
      negative,zero, or positive integer based on comparison

    • available

      public boolean available(Date date)
      Checks if the bus is available on a specific date.
      Parameters:
      date - the date to check
      Returns:
      true if the bus is free,false if it has a trip

    • updateLocalData

      public void updateLocalData(Scanner scan)
      Updates bus information interactively using Scanner. Prompts user for each field and keeps existing value if enter is hit.
      Parameters:
      scan - Scanner to read input

    • isSuitable

      public boolean isSuitable(String type)
      Checks if the bus is suitable for the type of trip.
      Parameters:
      type - the trip type
      Returns:
      true if bus can be used for this trip type

    • getEstimate

      public int getEstimate(String type, int numPassengers, int comfortLevel)
      Estimates cost for a trip.
      Parameters:
      type - trip type
      numPassengers - number of passengers
      comfortLevel - comfort level
      Returns:
      estimated price

    • canHold

      public boolean canHold(int numPassengers, int comfortLevel)
      Checks if bus can hold a number of passengers with a given comfort level.
      Parameters:
      numPassengers - number of passengers
      comfortLevel - comfort level
      Returns:
      true if capacity allows

    • promoteTrips

      public void promoteTrips()
      Prints trips assigned to this bus console

    • reserve

      public int reserve(Trip trip, Ministry mny)
      Attempts to reserve a trip for this bus.
      Parameters:
      trip - the trip to reserve
      mny - the Ministry to check approval.
      Returns:
      result of approval or -1 if failed.
